backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a travel itinerary planner, with persistent storage and CRUD operations for itineraries, activities, and proposals using Map-based storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a color contrast accessibility audit task targeting frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js to meet WCAG AA ratios while preserving the warm visual identity.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each component, hook, page, and data file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, muted, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Travel Itinerary Planner' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all app routes (home, new itinerary with optional destination search param, edit, and detail), wrapping them in the Layout and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/ActivityCard.tsx: Card component for displaying a single activity with inline editing (title, time, location, notes) and a delete confirmation dialog, using update/delete mutation hooks.
Form card component for adding a new activity to a specific itinerary day, with fields for title, time, location, and notes and a loading state on submit.
frontend/src/components/CountryPlanningS: A UI section that lets users select a country from a searchable combobox and either start planning a new itinerary or generate a sample AI itinerary for that destination.
frontend/src/components/ItineraryCard.ts: A card component that displays a summary of a single itinerary (trip name, destination, dates, description) and links to its detail page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sticky header with navigation links and a 'New Trip' button, a main content area, and a footer, with responsive mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/ProposalForm.tsx: A validated form component for submitting a custom itinerary request, collecting name, email, destination, dates, and notes, with a success confirmation state on submission.
A landing page section that highlights custom itinerary perks and toggles open the ProposalForm when the user clicks the request button.
frontend/src/data/countries.ts: A static exported array of all world country name strings used to populate country selection dropdowns.
frontend/src/data/sampleItineraries.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and country-specific 7-day itinerary templates (e.g., France) with day-by-day activities, locations, and notes, plus helper functions for generating start/end dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend, including queries for fetching itineraries and mutations for creating, updating, and deleting them, along with date conversion utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a warm earthy OKLCH color palette for both light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section, country planning section, proposal section, feature highlights, and a list of the user's itinerary cards fetched via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/ItineraryDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single itinerary showing trip header, day-by-day activity timeline with collapsible days, and controls to add/edit/delete activities or delete the entire trip.
frontend/src/pages/ItineraryForm.tsx: Create/edit itinerary form page with fields for trip name, destination, dates, and description; supports pre-population from URL params when editing or creating from a country selection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom font families (Playfair Display, Inter), an extended color palette (terracotta, forest, sand), border radii, and box shadows for the travel-themed UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, known issues (trip creation failure), and architectural notes for the travel itinerary planner app.
